title: DG Shipping Seafarer Medicals in Delhi | Global Wellness Centre
description: Same-day DG Shipping medicals for Indian & foreign vessels (Panama, Liberia). Book your seafarer exam at Global Wellness Centre, Delhi\'s trusted marine clinic.

Know More About Doctor Dr. Ritez Dr. Ritez Kumar is an Internal Medicine specialist with over 15 years of experience, including clinical practice in Botswana, Southern Africa. He holds an AMPH from ISB and Strategic Leadership training at IIM Ahmedabad, blending clinical expertise, global exposure, and strategic insight. His mission is simple: to keep you healthy — whether you are a seafarer preparing to sail, an individual managing chronic conditions, or a business seeking consultancy.
